name: Travis Perkins PLC
description: The UK's largest distributor of building materials to the trade, with Toolstation, BSS and other specialist businesses. Demerged Wickes in 2021.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: UK building materials distribution to trade customers. Revenue linked to RMI (repair, maintenance, improvement) and new-build activity. Toolstation growth channel. FY2024 revenue £4,607m (-4.8% on weaker volumes).
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin 3.3% in FY2024 (down from 4.1%). Property profits contribute ~£11m pa. Cost efficiency programme underway. Toolstation UK approaching profitability.
assumptions.risks: Cyclical exposure to UK construction activity. Net debt £191m pre-leases (£845m inc. IFRS 16). Volume declines in weak housing market. Toolstation France discontinued. Competitive building materials market.
assumptions.catalyst: UK housing market recovery, RMI demand improvement, Toolstation profitability inflection, cost savings programme delivery, property portfolio disposals.
assumptions.lastReportAnalysed: FY2024 Full Year Results (year ended 31 Dec 2024)
